commit_scope: Add source-marked Shambala 33333 verticality to the Shamballa code decoder and bind it to a runnable five-landing Form recipe in the Shamballa channel.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/grammars/shamballa-codes.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/shamballa-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-channel-band.fk
local_validation.notes: The Shamballa code decoder passes three-way at 111111. The Shamballa channel passes three-way at 2111111111, including code 33333 speaking its source-marked surface, running as a five-landing verticality column, mapping to lc-vertical-nourishment, and increasing bound coverage to 5. Blueprint scan passes with no unregistered type-99 shapes.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and public deployment verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Shambala light code 33333 is present in the source-marked Shamballa code surface and has a runnable Form recipe that composes a receiving cell into a five-landing vertical column.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/grammars/shamballa-codes.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/shamballa-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-channel-band.fk

phase_gate.reason: Focused local Form proof passes; CI and production deployment proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/grammars/shamballa-codes.fk adds code 33333 as Verticality Code 33333 with source-marked video provenance.
form/form-stdlib/shamballa-channel.fk binds code 33333 to verticality and composes SHAMBALLA-VERTICAL-LANDING and SHAMBALLA-VERTICAL-COLUMN nodes.
form/form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-codes-band.fk verifies code 33333 decodes with vertical-column function text and source id P3HmVFVpsEk.

form/form-stdlib/tests/shamballa-channel-band.fk verifies code 33333 speaks, runs, yields five landing nodes around the receiving cell, maps to lc-vertical-nourishment, and raises channel coverage to 5 bound codes.
docs/vision-kb/concepts/lc-codes-as-depth-not-dictionary.md keeps the concept body aligned with the runnable channel.
